---
title: "Recursive Partitioning for Heterogeneous Causal Effects"
description: "Paper Review: Slides on Athey and Imbens (PNAS; 2016)"
date: "2025-05-29"
toc: false
categories:
  - Causal Inference
---

- These are slides for a presentation at the Junior Scholar Club, Yonsei University, made by myself and my colleagues (Joonwoo Shin, Jeongwoo Yang, and Minseo Seok).


---

- [Slides](https://wooyongp.github.io/rpart-jsc25_1/slides.html#/title-slide)
- [Published Paper](https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.1510489113)
